title: AETHER AI - Generative Dev Workspace
description: An automated programming assistant that writes and compiles software live in sandboxed containers.
caseStudy: We built an interactive UI using motion animations and a node-based terminal. By deploying server-side proxy routes for the Gemini API, we achieved near-zero latency and ultimate security.

title: NEBULA - E-Commerce Fashion Paradigm
description: A high-fashion storefront featuring interactive 3D product modeling and frictionless single-step checkouts.
caseStudy: Nebula pushes front-end styling boundaries. Using Lenis for custom scrolling physics combined with GSAP ScrollTrigger, the interface transforms smoothly as elements scale into place.

title: CYPHER - Encrypted Mobile Wallet
description: A biometric-secured cross-platform cryptocurrency wallet featuring real-time market tickers.
caseStudy: Cypher bridges native iOS/Android cryptography with high-speed WebSockets. It delivers real-time portfolio value calculations and handles thousands of simultaneous transactions per second.

title: NEXUS - Spatial Logistics Dashboard
description: A bento-grid data visualizer that maps worldwide cargo operations in an interactive real-time projection.
caseStudy: For Nexus, we designed a dark mode interface prioritizing high data density and low cognitive load. The map combines real-time weather tracking with optimal delivery routes using Google Maps Platform APIs.
